title: onobrychis stenostachya
intro: Onobrychis stenostachya, also known as the narrow-spiked bird's-foot trefoil, is a plant species within the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Onobrychis stenostachya can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
